# Bayes-H3 sandbox toy fixtures

Deterministic panel data for research-only sandbox tests is generated in code:

- `mmm.research.bayes_h3_sandbox.fixtures.toy_sandbox_panel`
- `mmm.research.bayes_h3_sandbox.fixtures.toy_sandbox_bundle`

Two DMA geos, 12 weeks, channels `tv` and `search`, plus optional calibration-signal and geo-hierarchy stubs for H2d alignment checks.
